{"action":"created","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27239","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27239/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27239/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27239/events","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/27239","id":2472842508,"node_id":"I_kwDOAA3dP86TZJUM","number":27239,"title":"DOC: Remove outdated versionadded/changed directives?","user":{"login":"seberg","id":61977,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjYxOTc3","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/61977?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/seberg","html_url":"https://github.com/seberg","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/seberg/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/seberg/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/seberg/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/seberg/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/seberg/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/seberg/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/seberg/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/seberg/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/seberg/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[{"id":6359990,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWw2MzU5OTkw","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/labels/04%20-%20Documentation","name":"04 - Documentation","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":""},{"id":2971442611,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWwyOTcxNDQyNjEx","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/labels/sprintable","name":"sprintable","color":"5319e7","default":false,"description":"Issue fits the time-frame and setting of a sprint"}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":4,"created_at":"2024-08-19T09:02:47Z","updated_at":"2024-09-23T06:18:27Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"MEMBER","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"We have a huge number of `versionadded` and `versionchanged` directives e.g. find with:
```
git grep -E "\.\. version(changed|added):"
```
I think we should remove them at some point, since they are not really helpful when relating to NumPy versions that are long out of use.

For example, NumPy 1.18.x only supported Python 3.8 which is EOL.  So I directive up to (and including) 1.19, would be OK to be removed.

When removing, we need to make sure that the information contained for the new paths remains documented.

---

I don't mind keeping them around if others disagree, but I do think that at some point the only purpose they serve would be understanding that past decisions were made to change behavior.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27239/reactions","total_count":1,"+1":1,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27239/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/comments/2367314724","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/27239#issuecomment-2367314724","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27239","id":2367314724,"node_id":"IC_kwDOAA3dP86NGlsk","user":{"login":"SMAntony","id":64364731,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjY0MzY0NzMx","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/64364731?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/SMAntony","html_url":"https://github.com/SMAntony","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/SMAntony/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/SMAntony/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/SMAntony/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/SMAntony/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/SMAntony/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/SMAntony/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/SMAntony/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/SMAntony/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/SMAntony/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-09-23T06:18:26Z","updated_at":"2024-09-23T06:18:26Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"Hey Antony here. ### Documentation problem

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b3a93dff-dca7-466f-9544-b36fdf6211b8)

### Suggested fix for documentation



Change the value of the keyword arg 'how' to 'any'
